enemy.name: The Peer Reviewer

statusEffects.note: Gained from 3 previous turns with no Charge

enemy.special: onPlayerNoCharge: gains +3 permanent Strength each turn player doesn't Charge

hand.name: Lifetap
hand.description: Deal damage. Heal 20% of damage dealt.

relics.name: Whetstone
relics.description: All attacks +3 base damage. All shields -1 block.

relics.name: Herbal Pouch
relics.description: Apply 1 Poison to all enemies at turn start. Heal 3 HP after combat.

notes: The Peer Reviewer already has 3 stacks of Strength (equivalent to +75% damage multiplier) from 3 prior turns of no Charge. Now buffing again. This fight has escalated dangerously. With 3 AP: Empower + Expose + Heavy Strike kill it in 1 action sequence if charged. But the enemy is about to hit AGAIN for buffed damage if player blocks. No room for defensive play — must burst now.
